summary: Validate and fix the frontend build process for the React + TypeScript + Vite dashboard. Ensure TypeScript compilation succeeds, Vite bundling works correctly, and production artifacts are generated in the dist/ directory.

user_stories.i_want: the dashboard frontend to build successfully without errors
user_stories.so_that: the application can be deployed to production
acceptance_criteria: TypeScript compilation completes with no errors
Build artifacts exist in web/dashboard/dist/ directory
Generated files include index.html, CSS bundles, and JS bundles

user_stories.i_want: type checking to pass before building
user_stories.so_that: type errors are caught early in the development cycle
acceptance_criteria: npm run type-check executes without errors
No implicit any or missing type definition errors

user_stories.so_that: Docker images can be created consistently
acceptance_criteria: dist/ directory contains all necessary static assets

functional_requirements.title: TypeScript Compilation
functional_requirements.description: All TypeScript source files must compile without errors using the TypeScript compiler configured in tsconfig.json

functional_requirements.title: Vite Production Build
functional_requirements.description: Vite must successfully bundle the React application for production, generating optimized static assets

functional_requirements.title: Asset Generation
functional_requirements.description: Build process must generate index.html, CSS bundles, and JavaScript bundles in the dist/ directory

functional_requirements.title: Dependency Resolution
functional_requirements.description: All npm dependencies must be correctly installed and resolvable during the build process

functional_requirements.title: AI-powered intelligent routing
functional_requirements.description: ML-based routing of print jobs to optimal devices based on availability, cost, and environmental impact
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Significant differentiation in cloud-native print management

functional_requirements.title: Mobile printing SDK
functional_requirements.description: Cross-platform mobile SDK and reference apps for iOS/Android
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Enables BYOD and remote work scenarios

functional_requirements.title: Follow-me printing
functional_requirements.description: Secure print release at any device via NFC, QR code, or authentication
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Essential enterprise feature, improves security and convenience

functional_requirements.title: Cost analytics dashboard
functional_requirements.description: Per-user, per-department, per-device cost tracking with budget alerts
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Critical for enterprise procurement and cost management

functional_requirements.title: Advanced IoT monitoring
functional_requirements.description: Predictive maintenance alerts, supplies tracking, device health scoring

functional_requirements.title: Multi-tenant SaaS mode
functional_requirements.description: Organization isolation, branded portals, hierarchical admin

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Build time should complete in under 30 seconds for production builds
Bundle size should be optimized for web delivery

risks.risk: TypeScript version mismatch between dependencies causing compilation failures
risks.mitigation: Use consistent TypeScript versions across all packages

risks.risk: Vite configuration conflicts with TypeScript paths
risks.mitigation: Ensure tsconfig.json paths match Vite resolve.alias configuration

risks.risk: Missing peer dependencies causing runtime errors after build
risks.mitigation: Verify all dependencies are installed before building

implementation_phases.name: Validate Dependencies
tasks: Run npm install to ensure all dependencies are present

implementation_phases.name: TypeScript Validation
tasks: Review and fix any TypeScript errors
Ensure all type definitions are present

implementation_phases.name: Production Build
tasks: Check that dist/ directory contains expected files

implementation_phases.name: Build Artifact Verification
tasks: Verify CSS and JS bundles are generated

key_gaps: AI-powered print optimization and predictive maintenance
Native mobile applications for iOS and Android
Environmental impact and carbon footprint tracking
unique_selling_points: Cloud-native microservices architecture with container deployment
Open source with no vendor lock-in
Modern tech stack (Go 1.24, React, TypeScript, Vite)
